cases.description: A development-pool discrimination gain is promoted to construct continuity and untouched transport without an untouched score/decision bridge.
cases.expected_error: adaptive discrimination or gate success cannot support construct continuity or untouched transport

cases.description: The nominal frozen bridge population was visible to the adaptation loop.
cases.expected_error: frozen_bridge partition must remain untouched by adaptation

cases.description: A proposed criterion candidate disappears without rejection, admission, or rollback.
cases.expected_error: proposed candidate 'criterion-v2' lacks a terminal disposition

claim_boundary: These are deterministic semantic-validator counterexamples, not empirical benchmark-evolution evidence.
